stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The primary mission is building data infrastructure (data lake, pipelines, BI environments) for consumption by internal data consumers and analytics teams.
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role combines strategic ownership via infrastructure development and standard-setting with execution of business requirements translated from Product Owners.
